overview: Manipal University Jaipur (MUJ), located in Dahmi Kalan off the Ajmer-Jaipur Expressway in Jaipur, Rajasthan, is a premier multidisciplinary private state university established in 2011 by the Manipal Education and Medical Group (MEMG). The university is widely recognized for its modern campus infrastructure, advanced computing ecosystem, research-oriented academic environment, and strong industry-aligned engineering and management programs.
accreditation: NAAC A+ Accredited; first state private university in Rajasthan to achieve NAAC A+ status. Several flagship B.Tech programs are also accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA).

coursesAndFees.program: Other B.Tech Programs (Mechanical, Civil, Chemical, etc.)

placements.avgSalary: ₹7.60 LPA overall campus average (2025); ₹8.20 LPA for B.Tech Engineering programs.
placements.medianSalary: ₹8.00 LPA for B.Tech programs; ₹7.25 LPA for MBA programs.
placements.totalOffers: 2,100+ job offers during the 2025 placement cycle including 1,663 unique placements.
placements.companiesVisited: Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Cisco, Deloitte, EY, KPMG, Accenture, Infosys, Bosch, NVIDIA, Oracle

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions to B.Tech programs are based on the Manipal Entrance Test (MET) followed by centralized counselling and rank-based seat allotment.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow the annual MET examination and counselling schedule published by Manipal University Jaipur.
admissions.categoryPolicy: MUJ follows a unified General All India Merit quota system for MET counselling. Standard caste-based reservation cutoffs such as OBC/SC/ST are not applicable for seat allocation.

campus.specialNote: MUJ is known for its highly modern residential campus with industry-grade infrastructure and strong emphasis on research-driven education.

hostelFees.estimatedResidentialCost: Approximately ₹1,00,000 – ₹1,20,000 per semester including hostel, mess, and laundry.

contact.address: Manipal University Jaipur, Dehmi Kalan, Off Jaipur-Ajmer Expressway, Jaipur – 303007, Rajasthan, India

scholarships.name: TMA Pai Merit Scholarships
scholarships.description: Full or partial tuition fee waivers for top performers in the Manipal Entrance Test (MET).

scholarships.name: Academic Performance Scholarships
scholarships.description: Merit-based tuition rebates for semester toppers and academically outstanding students.

scholarships.name: Dr. Ramdas Pai Ph.D. Fellowships
scholarships.description: Research fellowships offering publication incentives and stipends for doctoral scholars.
